Primary dominant brand color; RGB 0,82,155; CMYK 100,76,6,1; Pantone 2145 C. Also cited as Deep Blue (dominant) in internal banner.
Primary color; RGB 255,198,10; CMYK 0,23,100,0; Pantone 7548 C. Cited as Golden Yellow (tertiary accent) in internal banner.
Secondary color; RGB 1,30,69; CMYK 100,89,40,49. Also used as drop-shadow color at low opacity.
Secondary color; RGB 0,61,116; CMYK 100,83,29,14. Used as button fill in gradient callout CTA.
Secondary color; RGB 53,140,203; CMYK 75,35,0,0.
Tertiary accent; RGB 242,106,56; CMYK 0,73,87,0. Sparing accent only; never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
Tertiary surface; RGB 254,241,200; CMYK 0,3,24,0. Text-heavy callout box fill.
Body text color on light backgrounds; RGB 33,33,33; CMYK 0,0,0,88.
Tertiary surface; RGB 230,240,249; CMYK 8,2,0,0. Callout box fill / chart panel.
White; RGB 255,255,255; CMYK 0,0,0,0. Text on dark, section backgrounds, icon badge fill.
